items.text: The GeoFence_singleton component maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.requirement_fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1

items.text: The component invokes circleLinearization function from geofence_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute distanceFromFence variable
items.fragment: The component invokes circleLinearization function from geofence_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute distanceFromFence variable
items.requirement_fragment: The component invokes circleLinearization function from geofence_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute distanceFromFence variable

items.text: The component sets the value of output port timeToRecovery to 1.7
items.fragment: The component sets the value of output port timeToRecovery to 1.7
items.requirement_fragment: The component sets the value of output port timeToRecovery to 1.7

items.text: When simulation time t reaches or exceeds the recovery time, distanceFromFence at current time instance must be greater than distanceFromFence at previous time instance
